{{< block "grid-1" >}}
{{< column "mt-2 pt-1">}}


# iOCdrv.sys ![:inline](/images/twitter_verified.png) 

### Description

iOCdrv.sys is a vulnerable kernel driver from the KeServiceDescriptorTable/vulnerable-drivers repository. The driver exposes dangerous kernel primitives to usermode.
- **UUID**: 9bf541fb-a68e-41a5-aab2-b939acc22bb1
- **Created**: 2026-04-17
- **Author**: Michael Haag
- **Acknowledgement**:  | [@rainbowdynamix, @DbgPrint](https://twitter.com/@rainbowdynamix, @DbgPrint)

{{< button "https://github.com/magicsword-io/LOLDrivers/raw/main/drivers/4b1d81db39537320eb823f5b4f2489e2.bin" "Download" >}}
{{< tip "warning" >}}
This download link contains the vulnerable driver!

{{< /tip >}}

{{< blockbanner "iOCdrv.sys" >}}
### Commands

```
sc.exe create iOCdrv binPath=C:\windows\temp\iOCdrv.sys type=kernel &amp;&amp; sc.exe start iOCdrv
```


| Use Case | Privileges | Operating System | 
|:---- | ---- | ---- |
| Elevate privileges | kernel | Windows 10 |



### Detections

{{< column >}}

{{< details "Expand" >}}
